AddConfiguration component interactions renders step buttons and navigates steps
AddConfiguration component interactions renders Cancel button and triggers cancelHandler

AddConfiguration component interactions renders correct step titles

ruleForSubscriptionFor wrapper
ruleForSubscriptionFor should reject when subFor is false and value is empty
ruleForSubscriptionFor should reject when subFor is false and value contains spaces
ruleForSubscriptionFor should resolve when subFor is false and value is valid
ruleForSubscriptionFor should resolve when subFor is true regardless of value

Parent should render logged-in menu when guestRole is not set

ErrorPage should render a Result component

parent wrapper
isAcessMasterDataDisabled should return false when user is dataset delegate
isAcessMasterDataDisabled should return false when user is read only
isAcessMasterDataDisabled should return false when user is dataset owner
isAcessMasterDataDisabled should return true when user is admin
isAcessMasterDataDisabled should return true when user is consumer
isAcessMasterDataDisabled should return true when entitlementType is not set
wrapper
ErrorAlert should render an Alert component
ErrorAlert should display the error message
ErrorAlert should have type error
ErrorAlert should show icon
ErrorAlert should handle empty message
RequestFormSteps should render Steps component
RequestFormSteps should render 3 Step components
RequestFormSteps should render Next button initially
RequestFormSteps should not render Previous button on first step
RequestFormSteps should have step titles
wrapper
wrapper
getHardCodedRole should return Owner role for owner PSIDs
getHardCodedRole should return Consumer role for consumer PSIDs
getHardCodedRole should return Admin role for admin PSIDs
getHardCodedRole should return null for unknown PSIDs
getHardCodedRole should handle numeric PSID input by converting to string
setLocalStorage should set all local storage items
setLocalStorage should overwrite existing local storage items
createNewUserProfile should create a user profile object with correct fields
createNewUserProfile should set lastLogin and firstLogin to current date/time
checkForString should return true when localStorage item contains the value
checkForString should return true for case-insensitive match
checkForString should return false when localStorage item does not contain value
checkForString should return falsy when localStorage item does not exist
checkForString should return true for partial match
camelize should convert space-separated text to camelCase
camelize should convert dash-separated text to camelCase
camelize should convert underscore-separated text to camelCase
camelize should convert dot-separated text to camelCase
camelize should handle single word
camelize should handle multiple separators
normalText should add space before uppercase letters and capitalize first letter
normalText should handle single word
normalText should handle already capitalized text
normalLabel should convert camelCase to normal label
normalLabel should handle single word
normalLabel should convert helloWorld to Hello world
camelText should capitalize first letter and lowercase rest
camelText should handle already formatted text
camelText should handle single character
camelText should handle null/undefined
checkUrlSlash should replace forward slash with %2F
checkUrlSlash should return original string when no slashes
checkUrlSlash should return undefined for 're' (case-insensitive)
checkUrlSlash should handle null/undefined
getCustomLabels should replace 'id' with 'ID' in labels
getCustomLabels should return normal label for regular text
getObjFromSubscription should return value from business requirements
getObjFromSubscription should return undefined when subscription is null
getObjFromSubscription should return undefined when businessRequirements is empty
getObjFromSubscription should return undefined when businessRequirements is missing
getObjFromSubscription should return undefined for non-existent key
isUnsubscribeDisabled should return true when user is dataset owner
isUnsubscribeDisabled should return true when user is read only
isUnsubscribeDisabled should return false when user is admin
isUnsubscribeDisabled should return false when user is consumer
isUnsubscribeDisabled should return false when entitlementType is not set
Contract modify should modify existing property error and message
Contract modify should return undefined when property does not exist
Contract modify should return a new object reference
Contract clarityIdValidation should return error when value is empty string
Contract clarityIdValidation should return error when value length is greater than 8
Contract clarityIdValidation should clear error when value is valid
Contract clarityIdValidation should accept value of exactly 8 characters
isAccesPageDisabled should return true (disabled) when objectMatrix is empty
isAccesPageDisabled should return true (disabled) when objectMatrix is not set
isAccesPageDisabled should return false (enabled) for Main Page with RW permission
isAccesPageDisabled should return false (enabled) for Main Page with R permission
isAccesPageDisabled should return true (disabled) for non-Main Page objName
isAccesPageDisabled should return true when no matching entry found
isAccesPageDisabled should match category case-insensitively but objectName exactly
isAccesPageDisabled should return true for Main Page with unknown permission
useAccessRights should return read permission for Read only role on myTasks page
useAccessRights should return read permission for Read only role on userManagement page
useAccessRights should return no read permission for Read only role on catalogue page
useAccessRights should return read permission for dataset delegate on userManagement
useAccessRights should return none permission for subscriber on myTasks page
useAccessRights should return none permission for subscriber on userManagement page
useAccessRights should return read permission for guest on catalogue page
useAccessRights should return none permission for guest on requestAccess page
useAccessRights should return none permission for guest on myTasks page
useAccessRights should return empty object for unrecognized role
loginValidation should return error for username with invalid characters
loginValidation should accept username with allowed special characters
loginValidation should accept numeric username
serverValidation should return error when value is defined with message
serverValidation should return no error when value is undefined
License bindData should call resetFields when data is empty
License bindData should call resetFields when data is null
License bindData should call setFieldsValue for regular fields
License bindData should convert boolean-like string fields to lowercase
License bindData should convert expirationDate to moment
License bindData should handle multiple known boolean fields
License bindData should not convert non-string boolean fields
wrapper
wrapper
RequestAccess bindData should not call setFieldsValue when data is empty
RequestAccess bindData should map reason field to reasonForSubscription
RequestAccess bindData should map licensesSubscribed to numberOfEndUserSubscriptions
RequestAccess bindData should map subscriptionStatus to status
RequestAccess bindData should also set the original field value
RequestAccess bindData should handle multiple items in data array
isButtonObject should return true (disabled) when objectMatrix is empty
isButtonObject should return true (disabled) when objectMatrix is not set
isButtonObject should return true for Main Page with RW permission
isButtonObject should return false for Main Page with R permission
isButtonObject should return false for non-Main Page with RW permission
isButtonObject should return true for non-Main Page with R permission
isButtonObject should return true when no matching entry found
isButtonObject should match case-insensitively
isCatelogueAccessDisabled should return true when user is dataset delegate
isCatelogueAccessDisabled should return true when user is dataset owner
isCatelogueAccessDisabled should return true when user is read only
isCatelogueAccessDisabled should return false when user is admin
isCatelogueAccessDisabled should return false when user is consumer
isCatelogueAccessDisabled should return false when entitlementType is not set
modify should modify existing property error and message
modify should return undefined when property does not exist
modify should return a new object reference
clarityIdValidation should set error when idExist is true
clarityIdValidation should clear error when idExist is false
itamIdValidation should set error when idExist is true
itamIdValidation should clear error when idExist is false
mandatoryFields should enable all when both clarityId and itamId have values
mandatoryFields should enable only itamId related when only itamId has value
mandatoryFields should enable only clarityId related when only clarityId has value
mandatoryFields should return defaults when both are empty
mandatoryFields should return defaults when both are undefined
isNumber should return true for digit key (0-9)
isNumber should return false for alphabetic key
isNumber should return true for control keys (charCode <= 31)
isNumber should return false for special character keys
isNumber should use keyCode when which is not available
isNumber should use window.event when evt is falsy
isSubscribersTabVisible should return true when user is IAM Admin
isSubscribersTabVisible should return false when user is Admin
isSubscribersTabVisible should return false when user is Consumer
isSubscribersTabVisible should return false when entitlementType is not set
isSubscribersTabVisible should match case-insensitively for IAM Admin
isUserManagementDisabled should return false when objectMatrix is empty
isUserManagementDisabled should return true when Main Page is not disabled but Edit Button is disabled
isUserManagementDisabled should return false when Main Page is disabled and Edit Button is not disabled
Contract bindData should not call setFieldsValue when data is null
Contract bindData should not call setFieldsValue when data is empty array
Contract bindData should call setFieldsValue for regular fields
Contract bindData should convert signedOn to moment date
Contract bindData should convert startDate to moment date
Contract bindData should convert expirationDate to moment date
Contract bindData should handle multiple fields in one data item
Contract bindData should filter out undefined elements from data array
UnsubscribeModal confirm should call Modal.confirm when invoked
UnsubscribeModal confirm should pass correct title
UnsubscribeModal confirm should pass correct okText
UnsubscribeModal confirm should pass correct cancelText
UnsubscribeModal confirm should set ok button as primary danger
UnsubscribeModal confirm should call unsubscribeHandler on OK
UnsubscribeModal confirm should not throw on cancel
getUniqueFileName should return timestamp with filename when fileObj has name
getUniqueFileName should return timestamp with .pdf extension when fileObj has no name
getUniqueFileName should return timestamp with .pdf extension when fileObj is null
getUniqueFileName should return timestamp with .pdf extension when fileObj is undefined
getUniqueFileName should generate unique filenames for different calls
getUniqueFileName should handle filenames with special characters
Constants should export HTTP methods
Constants should export content type
Constants should export role constants
Constants should export OWNER_ROLES as an array
Constants should export CONSUMER_ROLES as an array
Constants should export ADMIN_ROLES as an array
Constants should export local storage key constants
Constants should export page constants
getPermissionObject should return undefined when objectMatrix is empty
getPermissionObject should return undefined when objectMatrix is not set
getPermissionObject should return matching object when category and objectName match
getPermissionObject should match case-insensitively
getPermissionObject should return undefined when no match is found
getPermissionObject should handle items with null category or objectName
getPermissionObject should return the first matching object when multiple matches exist
